tasks.subject: Task 1: Add test build infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire test dependencies and source sets so `./gradlew test` and `./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest` compile and find test sources.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gradle/dependencies.gradle`
- Modify: `build.gradle`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `./gradlew compileDebugUnitTestKotlin` succeeds
- [ ] `./gradlew compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin` succeeds
- [ ] No new production code changes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugUnitTestKotlin compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gradle/dependencies.gradle", "build.gradle"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugUnitTestKotlin compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["compileDebugUnitTestKotlin succeeds", "compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refactor ErrorUtils for testability
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `internal` overloads to `getMessage`, `getMessageForProxerException`, and `handle` that accept `isLoggedIn: Boolean`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/ErrorUtils.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Public `getMessage(Throwable)` and `handle(Throwable)` signatures unchanged
- [ ] `internal fun getMessage(Throwable, Boolean)` exists
- [ ] `internal fun handle(Throwable, Boolean)` exists
- [ ] `internal fun getMessageForProxerException(ProxerException, Boolean)` exists
- [ ] `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` succeeds

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/ErrorUtils.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["public getMessage(Throwable) still compiles", "internal getMessage(Throwable, Boolean) exists", "internal handle(Throwable, Boolean) exists"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Unit tests — UniqueQueue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full coverage of `UniqueQueue`'s deduplication, FIFO ordering, and Queue contract.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/data/UniqueQueueTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] add/offer deduplication verified
- [ ] FIFO poll order verified
- [ ] peek, element(), isEmpty, size, remove(element), clear covered
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "me.proxer.app.util.data.UniqueQueueTest" --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`, `0 tests failed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/data/UniqueQueueTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"me.proxer.app.util.data.UniqueQueueTest\" --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all UniqueQueue tests pass", "deduplication verified", "FIFO order verified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Unit tests — BBParser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify `BBParser.parse()` tree structure using `mockkObject(TextPrototype)` to avoid Android SDK calls on JVM.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/view/bbcode/BBParserTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Plain text, bold, italic, underline, strikethrough tags verified
- [ ] Nested tags verified
- [ ] Unknown tag fallback to TextPrototype verified
- [ ] Unclosed tag handling verified
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "me.proxer.app.ui.view.bbcode.BBParserTest" --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`, `0 tests failed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/view/bbcode/BBParserTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"me.proxer.app.ui.view.bbcode.BBParserTest\" --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all BBParser tests pass", "bold/italic parsing verified", "nested parsing verified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Unit tests — ErrorUtils
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify every error type → string resource ID mapping and every error → buttonAction mapping.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/ErrorUtilsTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] IO/TIMEOUT/PARSING/UNKNOWN/CANCELLED ErrorTypes map correctly
- [ ] IP_BLOCKED, INVALID_TOKEN, USER_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS (both login states) verified
- [ ] NotLoggedInException/NotConnectedException/AgeConfirmationRequiredException verified
- [ ] PartialException data passthrough verified
- [ ] MangaLinkException OPEN_LINK + link data verified
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "me.proxer.app.util.ErrorUtilsTest" --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`, `0 tests failed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/ErrorUtilsTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"me.proxer.app.util.ErrorUtilsTest\" --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all error type mappings verified", "buttonAction mappings verified", "PartialException data passthrough verified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Unit tests — BaseViewModel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify BaseViewModel's loading/error/reload state machine using Koin test fakes.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/FakeAppModule.kt`
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/BaseViewModelTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] load() sets data on success
- [ ] load() sets error on failure
- [ ] isLoading is false after both success and failure
- [ ] reload() clears state before loading
- [ ] loadIfPossible() skips when isLoading is true
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "me.proxer.app.base.BaseViewModelTest" --no-daemon` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`, `0 tests failed`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/FakeAppModule.kt", "src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/BaseViewModelTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"me.proxer.app.base.BaseViewModelTest\" --no-daemon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load success sets data", "load failure sets error", "reload clears state", "loadIfPossible skips when loading"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Compose UI tests — TvErrorView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify TvErrorView renders correct buttons per ButtonAction and age-confirm dialog appears on click.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvErrorViewTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Generic error shows Retry button
- [ ] LOGIN action shows login button
- [ ] AGE_CONFIRMATION button click shows AlertDialog
- [ ] ACTION_MESSAGE_HIDE: button assertDoesNotExist()
- [ ] Error message text is displayed

**Verify:** `./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.tv.TvErrorViewTest`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/androidTest/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvErrorViewTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=me.proxer.app.tv.TvErrorViewTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["retry button shown for generic error", "login button shown for LOGIN action", "age confirm dialog shown on click", "HIDE removes button"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: CI integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add unit-tests and instrumented-tests jobs to ci.yml, both needing build.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] unit-tests job runs ./gradlew test, blocks on failure, needs: build
- [ ] instrumented-tests job uses reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2 api-level:30, continue-on-error:true
- [ ] YAML valid

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); print('YAML OK')"` → `YAML OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); print('YAML OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unit-tests job present with needs: build", "instrumented-tests job with emulator runner", "YAML validates"]}
```
